title: tephrosia oubanguiensis
intro: Tephrosia oubanguiensis, also known as the Congo pea, is a flowering plant species native to Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Tephrosia oubanguiensis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and its seeds can also be used to make a traditional medicine in various African cultures.
